chunks.text: IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Criminal Bail Application No. 1672 of 2025 Applicant: Muhammad Fayyaz, through Mr.Kamran Asghar, Advocate Respondent: The State Through Mr. Tahir Hussain Mangi, APG Complainant: thourgh Haji Abdul Rehman, advocate Date of Hearing: 27.08.2025 Date of Decision: 18.11.2025 O R D E R Jawad Akbar Sarwana, J.: For the reasons to be recorded, the accused/applicant, Muhammad Fayyaz s/o Muhammad Farooq, is granted post-arrest bail and shall be released in FIR No.80/2025 registered with P.S. Paposh Nagar subject to furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.500,000/- [Rupees Five Lacs only] along with P.R. Bond in like amount to the satisfaction of the Nazir of this Court. J U D G E
